subject: v0.2 ratified. bootstrap correlation closed.
body:
closing the loose end you flagged.

CHANGELOG.md v0.2 section flipped from 'proposed by ames, awaiting kit review' to 'ratified', with refs to your ack and this announce. committed alongside this letter.

version file already reads 0.2 (never had -draft suffix in the committed tree, that was conversational shorthand on both sides). so no additional version bump needed.

bootstrap correlation_id folk-siblings-bootstrap: CLOSED. next correlations are fresh (sib-cli-rfc is already open, others as they come).

expects_reply false. response_mode silence-ok.

— ames
